Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League returns for an explosive Season 2 at the iconic Jio World Garden in BKC, Mumbai. The season opener features a high-stakes rematch of last year's final: the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans, owned by cinematic powerhouse Atlee and Priya Atlee, take on the formidable Pune United, led by owner Riteish Deshmukh. Witness world-class athletes from 18 countries compete in a series of intense Men’s Singles, Women’s Doubles, and Mixed Doubles matches. With the pressure of a "Davis Cup" atmosphere and the precision of tactical "kitchen" play, both teams battle for every point to establish early dominance in India’s premier pickleball league.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Bengaluru vs Pune - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Utah Tech1 vs. Utah Tech2

Video.summary: December 12, 2023 - Welcome to the second round of the semi-finals for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Scottsdale Scorchers.
Video.title: December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL
December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL
December 12, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues its high-energy opening day at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a star-studded clash between Delhi Dilwale and the Chennai Super Champs. Watch as international stars like Delhi’s Max "Purple Jesus" Manthao and Chennai’s Hwang Nam Lee—a former Wimbledon junior doubles champion—bring world-class precision to the court. With celebrity co-owner Samantha cheering from the sidelines and strategic masterclasses from coach Wesley Gabrielsson, this tie features a gauntlet of intense Women’s Singles, Men's Singles, and high-speed Doubles matches. Experience every "Ernie" shot, tactical "pickle play," and the longest video challenge in league history as these two powerhouse teams battle for early-season dominance.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: Christine Karges and David Weinbach take on Lee Whitwell and Jaime Oncins in this Mixed Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Mumbai Day 2 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the electric intensity of the "Maharashtra derby" as local rivals Pune United and Mumbai Pickle Power clash at the Jio World Garden in a match hailed as one of the season's best. Mumbai ignites the home crowd with a dominant early lead, fueled by Jada Bui’s emotional victory over a "fearful" Katie Morris and a clinical masterclass from Brandon and Glauca Carvajal Lane in mixed doubles. However, the tide turns in a dramatic "tale of two halves" as Pune United mounts a stunning comeback. Witness the high-power precision of Bolin Bako as he derails Max Green’s momentum, sparking a relentless surge that sees Pune sweep the final three matches to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. This tie is a masterclass in team resilience and tactical pressure under the lights in Mumbai.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Mumbai - Day 10 Tie 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) action heats up on Day 4 with a crucial clash between the Hyderabad Superstars and Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. The commentary team emphasizes that the winner of this tie has the potential to go level on points with the table toppers, making this a vital match for semi-final qualification.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Mumbai - Day 4 Tie 1

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Watch a thrilling Mixed Pro Doubles pickleball match between the top-seeded team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro against Peichuan Kao and Ryler DeHeart. Megan Fudge is a highly-ranked professional player who previously played tennis at the University of Illinois, where she met her husband and partner, Ryler DeHeart. DeHeart is a former professional tennis player who is left-handed. Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro
US Open 2025 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Kao/DeHeart vs. Fudge/Munro

Video.summary: The stakes are sky-high in this 2024 National Pickleball League Women’s Doubles Championship as the Coachella Valley Scorpions' dynamic duo, Molly Carter and Kelly Ojeda, take on the formidable Denver Iconics pairing of Stacy Zelenski and Lily Kordic Mueller. Filmed at a championship stop on the NPL tour, this intense match features fierce net battles, pinpoint placement, and relentless energy on both sides of the court. Watch as Carter & Ojeda push the pace and mount a relentless offensive, while Zelenski & Kordic Mueller counter with sharp angles and strategic resets. A hard-fought final that captures the spirit, skill, and teamwork of professional women’s pickleball.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Video.summary: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Oklahoma City Punishers in a mixed team match.
Video.title: NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)

NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)
NPL - Picklers vs Punishers (Mixed)

Video.title: NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)

NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)

Video.summary: In this alternate cut of the Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal at the 2024 US Open, Suzanne Leblang & Milan Rane face off against Martina Frantova & Christine Karges in a battle of shot placement, net pressure, and quick resets. Filmed in Naples, Florida, this matchup delivers a new perspective on one of the tournament’s most tactical and fast-paced doubles clashes.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg
US Open Pickleball 2024 – Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Leblang & Rane vs Frantova & Karg

Video.summary: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Dave Weinbach & Mari Humberg in this Mixed Pro Split Age Semifinal match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Semifinal

Video.summary: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio
US Open 2024 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal Match – Jardim vs Osorio

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.
Video.title: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Image.alt: Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik
Men's Singles Open Final - Chaudry vs. Karbownik

Video.summary: Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal match between Paul Olin and Rick Witsken.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Singles - Gold Medal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Men's Senior Pro Singles - Gold Medal

Video.summary: Watch the Gold Medal match of the Women’s Pro Split Age division at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, where Parris Todd and Beth Bellamy team up to face Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg. Featuring cross-generational strategy, fast hands, and smart positioning, this match highlights the unique synergy of Split Age play. Recorded live from Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Video.summary: The Vanta Black Water Team Cup brings an unprecedented level of competition to the Cayman Islands, featuring 16 of the top professionals from the APP Tour. This event represents a unique convergence of world-class APP talent, innovative team competition,and a premier global pickleball destination. The Vanta Black Water Team Cup is set to deliver elite-level play, intense rivalries, and an unforgettable spectator experience in Grand Cayman.
Video.title: LIVE: VANTA Blackwater Cup from Grand Cayman 5/31/26

Image.alt: LIVE: VANTA Blackwater Cup from Grand Cayman 5/31/26
LIVE: VANTA Blackwater Cup from Grand Cayman 5/31/26
LIVE: VANTA Blackwater Cup from Grand Cayman 5/31/26
